name: Glare
description:
'''Glare''' is an American [[grungegaze]] band from the [[Lower Rio Grande Valley]], [[Texas]]. Formed in 2014, under the name '''Dispirit''', their original influences were [[Superheaven]], [[Title Fight]] and [[Basement (band)|Basement]]. Following their 2017 name change, their influences shifted to [[Nothing (band)|Nothing]] and [[Whirr]].

In 2017, they released their debut songs "Into Me" and "Blank". In 2021, they released the [[extended play|EP]] ''Heavenly''. They released their first album, Sunset Funeral in April 2025. Releasing the single "Mourning Haze" in August 2024. as a leadup
